name: Commodity banner program proposal workbook
description: Imports intervention or proposal rows from Rice, Corn, HVCDP, NUPAP, Livestock, OAP, Halal, NSHP, and similar banner sheets.
expectedSheets: RICE; CORN; HVCDP; NUPAP; LIVESTOCK; OAP
requiredColumns: PROGRAM/SUBPROGRAM/ INDICATORS; UNIT OF MEASURE; FY 2027 PROPOSAL; Remarks (Breakdown of Municipality Target for FY 2027 )
importMode: Google Drive upload, convert to Google Sheets, extract rows by configured sheet profile

name: FMR / infrastructure proposal workbook
description: Imports project rows with municipality, barangay/location, project name, estimated length, and amount.
requiredColumns: MUNICIPALITY; LOCATION (BARANGAY); NAME OF PROJECTS; ESTIMATED LENGTH (KM); ESTIMATED AMOUNT
importMode: Google Drive upload, convert to Google Sheets, extract project rows into proposals and physical targets
sourceBasis: source-files/sample-excel-files/* District * 2027*.xlsx and source-files/powerpoint-references/FMR PBP FY 2027.pptx

name: BED financial and physical capture workbook
description: Imports BED 1 obligation, BED 2 physical, and BED 3 disbursement values without overwriting earlier phase snapshots.
expectedSheets: FINANCIAL CAPTURE SHEET; PHYSICAL CAPTURE SHEET; BED 1 GENERATED; BED 2 GENERATED; BED 3 GENERATED
requiredColumns: PRPOPOSAL/BEDS; OU; PREXC PROGRAM; PREXC SUB-PROGRAM; ACTIVITY; MONTH; QUARTER; MOOE (Php '000); CO (Php '000); TOTAL (Php '000)
importMode: Google Drive upload, convert to Google Sheets, append phase_history and BED budget/target rows
